definitions: A badge or sticker worn on clothing, bearing a person's name, typically for identification at an event or in a workplace.
A small plate or tag, typically made of metal or plastic, attached to an object (such as luggage or a pet's collar) for identification purposes.
examples: Please wear your name tag at all times.
Her name tag clearly showed her role.
The dog's name tag had his owner's phone number.
Attach a name tag to your suitcase.
